evidence.source_title: Iranian Officials Deny Ties With 'Infiltrator' Jewish Female — Iran International
evidence.description: Iran International confirms that Perez-Shakdam traveled to Iran during the 2017 presidential election and conducted an interview with then-candidate Ebrahim Raisi, gaining access to elite political circles while operating under her Muslim persona.

editorial_notes: Raisi was interviewed by Perez-Shakdam during the 2017 presidential election campaign. At the time she was presenting as a Muslim Shia analyst for pro-Iran outlets.
